topic_text: When Smart Home/Away from ecobee, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on lights by motion. When motion is detected by ecobee the Wink hub turns on its connected Lights.
When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If weekday morning at 6:00 AM, then turn on the lights. Select a Wink shortcut to turn on your lights

When Motion has been detected from Withings Home, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If motion is detected by Withings Home, then activate Wink app shortcut Entry Lights On. Great for motion activated security lights, If motion is detected by Withings Home, then activate Wink app shortcut Entry Lights On.

When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. When a device disconnects from OnHub set Nest thermostat temperature. Control Nest thermostat temperature with OnHub.
When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. When a device connects to OnHub set Nest thermostat temperature. Control Nest thermostat temperature with OnHub.
When Alarm activated from abode, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If alarm is activated, then turn all lights on. If alarm is activated, then turn all lights on
When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Leaving House. Leaving turn off hvac
When Smart Home/Away from ecobee, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on lights by motion. When motion is detected by ecobee the Wink hub turns on its connected Lights.
When Smart Home/Away from ecobee, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Ecobee motion turns on the lights. Use remote motion sensors to trigger wink shortcuts
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Evening: Patio Lights ON. Evening: Patio Lights ON

When You enter an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on Lights when I get home. I typically would use Wink Geofencing to make this happen, but there is a known bug in their last firmware updateThis recipe uses my location to activate my Wink shortcut.

When Say a simple phrase from Google Assistant, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. Give Priority to a device connected to Onhub/Wifi from Google Assistant. Why open the Onhub/Wifi app to give a device priority when you can tell your Pixel phone to give itThis example is for a Roku.
When Say a simple phrase from Google Assistant, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. Prioritize Your Pixel. This will prioritize your already speedy Pixel on your network for an hour.
When Say a simple phrase from Google Assistant, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. Prioritize Your Chromecast. This will prioritize a selected Chromecast for that hour-long Netflix session.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. On. On
When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If you exit a location then turn off lights. If you exit a location then turn off lights

When You enter an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When iPhone senses you're home, turn on lights. When your iPhone senses you are home, trigger Wink to turn on your lightsTips: 1) Use Wink compatible lights2) Use the Wink HUB to allow your smart products to work together3) Create a Shortcut in the Wink App to turn on lights, then use IFTTT to trigger this shortcut when your iPhone senses you are home.

When You enter an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When Android senses your home, turn on lights. When your Android phone senses you are home, trigger Wink to turn on your lightsTips: 1) Use Wink compatible lights2) Use the Wink HUB to allow your smart products to work together3) Create a Shortcut in the Wink App to turn on lights, then use IFTTT to trigger this shortcut when your Android phone senses you are home.
When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. When a device connects to OnHub set Nest thermostat temperature. Control Nest thermostat temperature with OnHub.

When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. When a device disconnects from OnHub set Nest thermostat temperature. Control Nest thermostat temperature with OnHub.

When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Onhub & Nest: Improve Auto-Away (on arriving). Dramatically improves Nest's auto-assist performanceUpon my phone disconnecting from my Onhub router, it jacks the Nest's thermostat temperature up to 90 in the summer time, effectively turning it offUpon reconnecting to my Onhub router, it restores the Nest's thermostat setting to 78Works perfectlyPractically no delay upon leaving/entering home.

When Say a simple phrase from Google Assistant, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. OKGoogle trigger a specific shortcut in Wink. Use this to use casual language to trigger a certain shortcut you've set up in WinkI have a group of lights for the back of the houseSo at the end of the night, I can turn everything off with this one shortcut.
When Say a simple phrase from Google Assistant, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. light on wink. Turn on a wink shortcut by saying "lights on"

When Motion detected from Manything, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Manything activates outside lights. I have a driveway alarm and when it goes off usually my Manything motion detection camera will trigger as wellSo at 3am if someone enters my driveway, my manything will trigger and send a message to Wink Shortcuts to turn on all outside lights! Genius!
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on lights at Sunset using Wink. Connect Weather channel and set to your local area.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on the Outdoor lights at Sunset.. I had trouble getting Hue to consistently control these GE Link bulbs and I wanted to continue automating them, so I paired them with my Wink hub and created this instead.

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. 15 minutes before sunset, activate Wink shortcut for lights. I use this to activate my lights at duskJust assign a shortcut to your lights on Wink and use this to send the signal.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn-on Light at Sunset. Turn-on lights via WINK 15 minutes before sunset

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Turn outlet on using Wink: Pivot Power Genius. Turn Pivot Power Strip on at Sunset. Use a Pivot Power Strip and a Wink app robot to control any Wink item you want at sunset.

When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If Sunrise, turn outside lights off. (wink hub / GE Link bulbs)Since my Hue bridge was always disconnecting from my GE link bulbs I decided to use Wink insteadAlexa doesnt control GE Link bulbs anymore on the Wink hub (?) so I made this.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. At sunrise run wink shortcut. you can use this to turn lights off at sunrise, or any other wink shortcut.

When New sound or motion event from Nest Cam, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. If new sound or motion event, then prioritize Nest Cam on OnHub. Prioritize Nest Cam on OnHub when it notices anything.

When Button press from Button widget, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn off all my lights and adjust my thermostat. Turn off lights around your home and adjust your thermostat with IFTTT and Wink.Tips: 1) Use Wink compatible lights and thermostat.2) Use the Wink HUB to allow your smart products to work together.3) Create a Shortcut in the Wink App to turn off lights and adjust thermostat, then use IFTTT to trigger this shortcut.

When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat. Set Nest temp when device disconnects from OnHub. When a mobile device disconnects for OnHub, set the Nest to certain temp
When Button press from Button widget, do Toggle on/off using Wink: Pivot Power Genius. Toggle outlet on/off. Choose an outlet on your Pivot Power Genius and quickly toggle it on/off.

When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Set temperature using GE Appliances GeoSpring. When a device connects to OnHub set the temperature of your GE water heater. Control GE water heater with OnHub.

When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Turn off using D-Link Smart Plug. Turn off switch when you disconnect from OnHub. Turn off any device that's plugged into your D-Link switch as you leave home and disconnect from your OnHub network.

When Motion detected at location from Homeboy, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. If motion detected by Homeboy, prioritize camera on OnHub. If my Homeboy camera detects motion, prioritize that camera on my OnHub Wi-Fi.
When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Change camera mode using Withings Home. When a device connects to OnHub change Withings camera mode. Control Withings camera with OnHub.
When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn off lights when I leave home area. Must create an "all lights off" shortcut in the Wink app first.
When Smart Home/Away from ecobee, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Ecobee Smart Away: Trigger Wink Shortcut. When Ecobee goes into smart away mode it triggers a Wink shortcut.
When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Time-triggered Wink shortcut. Use this to trigger a Wink Shortcut at a certain time on certain days.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn on all lights. Turns on all lights

When Every day at from Date & Time, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Activate Wink shortcut at a given time. Activates a Wink shortcut at a given time Useful for controlling a device/devices for which scheduling currently is not provided by Wink (e.g., lock all locks at midnight and optionally also turn on/off other lights or devices as defined in the shortcut).

When Motion detected from D-Link Motion Sensor, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. If new motion event on D-Link sensor, then prioritize a device connected to OnHub. Prioritize a device connected to OnHub.
When Ignition turned off from Automatic Classic, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When I get home, turn on my lights. Turns your lights on when you get home :D

When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Set to away mode using Netatmo Thermostat. When a device disconnects from OnHub set Netatmo thermostat to away mode. Control Netatmo thermostat temperature with OnHub.

When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Turn on lights using Philips Hue. Turn your Philips Hue lights on when a device connects to OnHub. Turn on your lights when a device that you specify connects to your OnHub network.
When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Turn off lights using Philips Hue. When a device disconnects from OnHub turn off Philips Hue lights. Control Philips Hue lights with OnHub.

When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Switch on using SmartThings. OnHub to control SmartThings presence. You first need to create a virtual presence device in SmartThings that has switch capabilities
When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If a device disconnects from OnHub, activate a Wink shortcut. Control Wink shortcuts with OnHub.

When Ignition turned off in area from Automatic Classic, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. Give yourself priority when you park your car. When you arrive home and turn off your car's ignition, OnHub will automatically prioritize your device.
When Button press from Wink Relay, do Display message on Tesla dashboard using EVE For Tesla. Push button, remind spouse!. Send someone a message to their Tesla, with a simple tap!
When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. When my phone disconnects prioritize my nest cam.. When my phone disconnects prioritize my nest cam.

When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. Prioritize a device when it connects to your OnHub network. Have OnHub prioritize a device when it connects to your network.
When Device Disconnects from Google Wifi, do End activity using Harmony. When a device disconnects from OnHub end Harmony activity. Control Harmony activities with OnHub.
When Motion detected from Arlo, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Arlo turns on lights. Have Arlo motion detection turn on your lights while you are away from the house.

When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When iPhone senses you leave home, turn off lights. When iPhone senses you leave home, turn off lights using Wink shortcuts. Create a wink shortcut in the Wink app to use here.
When Arriving soon from BMW Labs, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. When BMW is arriving soon have OnHub prioritize a device. Have OnHub prioritize a device when a BMW is arriving.
When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Activate a scene using Bang & Olufsen's BeoLink Gateway. When a device connects to OnHub start a BeoLink scene. Control BeoLink with OnHub.

When Device is unplugged from Android Battery, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. When you unplug your phone from charging, give it Wi-Fi priority. Automatically prioritize your phone when it is disconnected from chargeAvailable for Android devices only.

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Wink Lights on When Raining Between 4pm and Sunset. 1Setup a robot to turn on selected lights between certain hours (I chose 4pm to sunset) with motion detection (you need a motion detector).2Create an on shortcut for the above robot.3Create an off shortcut for the above robot.4Select this Applet and select the "on" shortcut.5Create another Applet to select the "off" robot everyday at 11:59pm to reset this Applet.
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn Lights on at Sunset. Select the wink shortcut to switch the lights on
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. At a select time every day, prioritize a certain device. Schedule OnHub to prioritize a device at a certain time every day.

When Event from search starts from Google Calendar, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Use Google Calendar for a Wink Light Schedule. Wink home lighting control schedules can be moved to a Gmail calendarThis makes it easy to make adjustments to a specific day like when you want to let your kids sleep in or you want to keep your lights set during a party Create a new "Lights" calendar to keep the lighting events separate from normal calendar items You can hide this calendar after your lighting schedule is set.Add recurring events to the calendar like "morning." Then use an Applet like this to trigger a Wink shortcut like "Morning Mode." Similar Applets can be created to trigger Wink shortcuts like "Home" "Sleep Mode" or "All Off."
When Device Connects from Google Wifi, do Start activity using Harmony. When a device connects to OnHub start Harmony activity. Control Harmony activities with OnHub.

When New sound or motion event from Nest Cam, do Prioritize Device using Google Wifi. If new sound or motion event, then prioritize Nest Cam on OnHub. Prioritize Nest Cam on OnHub when it notices anything.

When You enter an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When Android senses your home, turn on lights. When your Android phone senses you are home, trigger Wink to turn on your lights. Tips: 1) Use Wink compatible lights. 2) Use the Wink HUB to allow your smart products to work together. 3) Create a Shortcut in the Wink App to turn on lights, then use IFTTT to trigger this shortcut when your Android phone senses you are home.

When Mode changed from abode, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If Abode mode changed to home, then dim front lights to 1%. Create a group in Wink off all the lights you would like dimmedThe create a shortcut and set the brightness level
When A device is turned off from HomeSeer, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Grandma's wink light. easy way to control wink light in Homeseer
When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Turn off lights when I leave home area. Must create an "all lights off" shortcut in the Wink app first.
When You exit an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. If you exit a location then turn off lights. If you exit a location then turn off lights

When You enter an area from Location, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. When iPhone senses you're home, turn on lights. When your iPhone senses you are home, trigger Wink to turn on your lights. Tips: 1) Use Wink compatible lights. 2) Use the Wink HUB to allow your smart products to work together. 3) Create a Shortcut in the Wink App to turn on lights, then use IFTTT to trigger this shortcut when your iPhone senses you are home.
